test_description: Remove the chapter title from the introduction excerpt and test whether `هذا الباب` remains safely interpretable.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Hidden dependence on title retention for chapter-reference self-containment.
why_this_test_matters: It distinguishes a merely nice title from a required one.

test_description: Start the ruling excerpt directly at `لأن` and evaluate whether the excerpt remains safe without retained upstream context.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Causal continuation failure masked by apparent readability.
why_this_test_matters: This is one of the owner's clearest examples of why blind splitting is dangerous.

test_description: Remove the retained lead-in and test whether `عليهما` and `غسلهما` still have a safe internal anchor.
why_this_test_matters: It exposes a silent self-containment failure that looks harmless at first glance.

test_description: Keep the entire passage merged as one entry and compare it against the split candidates for function clarity.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the merged entry hides multiple jobs under one label.
why_this_test_matters: It tests the main local verdict directly rather than assuming it.

test_description: Classify the whole passage as introduction-only and inspect what ruling/proof/refutation information becomes misplaced.
why_this_test_matters: This is the exact flattening the owner rejects.

test_description: Treat the first sentence as a full-topic introduction to المسح على الخفين rather than a proof-specific chapter introduction.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Source-scope mismatch and false topic framing.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly warns that this could distort understanding of the whole leaf.

test_description: Apply the forgiving rule too aggressively and see whether proof overview and refutation remain wrongly trapped inside one broad hukm entry.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Over-forgiveness after the point where carryover is no longer negligible.
why_this_test_matters: It tests the owner's shift from 99/1 retention to 33/33/33 split pressure.

test_description: Isolate the proof-overview excerpt exactly at `فهو ...` with no retained anchor and evaluate whether the proof unit remains safely grounded.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether proof-overview splitting creates a new semantic anchoring problem.
why_this_test_matters: This is a real unresolved pressure point once deeper sub-excerpting begins.

test_description: Compare two versions of the refutation excerpt: one keeping the short hukm-return clause and one stripping it out entirely.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: The tradeoff between local function purity and knowledge scattering.
why_this_test_matters: It tests one of the owner's clearest later refinements.
